name: market_data_disconnect
title: Market Data Feed Disconnection
description: Simulates a complete market data feed outage on the TSX (XTSE) venue due to upstream provider failure.
background: CME Group has a connectivity issue and the TSX market data feed goes completely silent. No quotes, no heartbeats arrive from XTSE. Orders queued for XTSE routing will fail until the feed is restored. This tests the broker's ability to detect a dead venue and route around it.

steps.action: Verify all venue feeds are active and quoting
steps.expected_state: XNYS, XTSE, XLON all reporting active with fresh quotes

steps.action: Disconnect XTSE venue market data feed
steps.expected_state: XTSE shows as disconnected; no quotes received for >10s

steps.action: Attempt to route a buy order for RY.TO
steps.expected_state: BrokerHost detects XTSE is down and routes to alternative venue or rejects with venue_down

steps.action: Check broker routing log for failover behavior
steps.expected_state: Order either rerouted to XNYS with symbol resolution (RY.TO → RY) or flagged stuck

steps.action: Restore XTSE feed and verify quote recovery
steps.expected_state: XTSE reconnects; RY.TO quotes resume within 2s
